name: BIGO Ads (Bigo Live, Likee, IMO)
native_visual_elements: Live-stream UI overlays: Floating hearts, dynamic gift animations, scrolling viewer comments
Real-time Face-cam: Circular or square inset of a 'Streamer' reacting to the game
Social Indicators: 'Online' green dots, fake 'New Message' or 'Incoming Call' pop-ups for IMO
Status Symbols: VIP frames, gilded notification bars, and server-wide announcement banners
psychological_hooks: The 'Social Companion' Hook: A real person looking into the camera saying 'Play with me' (Direct POV)
The 'Social Pride' Hook: Showing how a player dominates the leaderboards or receives 'gifts' from others
The 'Exclusive Club' Hook: Using words like 'Elite', 'VIP-Only', or 'Secret' to trigger the desire for status
The 'Urgent Call' Hook: Mocking an app notification that the user's base/alliance is under attack

platform_logic.audio_strategy: High-energy voiceovers with a 'Broadcast' persona. Localized slang is mandatory
platform_logic.visual_tone: High saturation, bright lighting, high-contrast text overlays
platform_logic.cta_style: Social-action oriented (e.g., 'Join My Clan', 'Challenge Me', 'Talk to Me')

algorithm_optimization.ctr_triggers: Use real-human faces in the first 1s to lower ad-fatigue
algorithm_optimization.retention_logic: Feature 'Gift-giving' or 'Loot-opening' moments at the 5s mark
algorithm_optimization.conversion_focus: Align CTA with the user's desire for social connection or territorial dominance
